title: Solderless or groundless electromagnetic shielding in electronic devices
abstract: An example electronic device is disclosed that includes a printed circuit board, an electronic component coupled to the printed circuit board, and a solderless shield coupled to the printed circuit board and covering the electronic component.
claims: 1. An electronic device comprising: a printed circuit board that consists of eight layers; memory routing in the second layer and the fourth layer of the eight layers of the printed circuit board; an electronic component coupled to the printed circuit board; and a solderless shield coupled to the printed circuit board and covering the electronic component.
